comment: Per-persona past sized purchases for personalized fit advice (MT10 Fix 3). Matched by brand (first word of an item title) or category. fit_outcome in {fit_true, ran_small, ran_large}. Backs the `personal` block in GET /size-advice/{asin}?persona=... MT12 NEW 2: every title here also appears as a row in orders.json rahul_order_history (so 'you earlier bought this' resolves to a real order). MT12 NEW 3: brands are distinct/editable — Stride (past) vs Aurelle (the shoe PDP) makes the cross-brand sizing story land.
